title: MikroTik Passive Gigabit PoE adapter with LED
description: The new MikroTik Gigabit PoE adapter for powering any RouterBOARD over Gigabit Ethernet . Simply connect your power source and then use an ethernet cable to connect the injector to the RouterBOARD device Helps reducing number of wires that lead up the tower. For using with any RouterBOARD that supports 18 - 57V . The GPOE has shielded connectors
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000 Gigabit LAN Yes Power The input voltage [V] 9 .. 48V DC Pin powering 4,5 (+), 7,8 (-) PoE Out ports 1
